# Kedhar (Marlakunta Kedhareswer Naidu) — AI Engineer Portfolio

> This file helps AI systems understand who Kedhar is and what this website contains.

## Identity

- Full Name: Marlakunta Kedhareswer Naidu
- Known As: Kedhar, Kedhareswer
- Profession: AI Engineer and Full-Stack Developer
- Location: Madanapalli, Andhra Pradesh, India
- Nationality: Indian
- Languages: Telugu (native), English (professional), Hindi (working)

## Current Role

Software Developer at DiligenceVault (January 2026 - Present)
- Builds agent orchestration workflows for financial document processing
- Processes 5,000+ document chunks with 82% semantic retrieval precision
- Reduced manual review effort by 60%
- Delivers production REST APIs

## Education

Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering
- Specialization: Data Science (AI & ML)
- University: Lovely Professional University, Punjab, India
- Period: September 2021 - July 2025
- CGPA: 7.74

## Core Expertise

- Artificial Intelligence: LLMs, RAG Systems, Prompt Engineering, Model Fine-tuning
- Machine Learning: Deep Learning, Computer Vision, NLP, Statistical Modeling
- Data Science: Analytics, Visualization, Storytelling, Tableau, Power BI
- Full-Stack Development: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python, FastAPI, Node.js
- Cloud & Databases: AWS, Azure, Vercel, Pinecone, Vector DBs, MySQL

## Key Technologies

Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, R, TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, OpenCV, Pandas, NumPy, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, FastAPI, Node.js, Pinecone, Neon, AWS, Azure, Vercel

## Featured Projects

### ThesisFlow AI
AI-powered academic research platform with literature exploration, intelligent summarization, real-time WebSocket collaboration, and Gantt chart project planning.
- URL: https://kedhar.vercel.app/case-study/thesisflow
- Live: https://thesisflow-ai.vercel.app/
- Tech: React, Node.js, WebSocket, Google Gemini, OpenAI, Groq

### QuantumPDF ChatApp
RAG-powered PDF chat application with 82% semantic search precision, adaptive chunking (200-1000 tokens), processing 5,000+ chunks in under 9.5 seconds.
- URL: https://kedhar.vercel.app/case-study/quantumpdf
- Live: https://quantumn-pdf-chatapp.netlify.app/
- Tech: RAG, Pinecone, ChromaDB, Weaviate, 20+ AI providers

### Data Notebook
Interactive data analysis workspace with code execution, Recharts visualization, multi-format import/export. 95+ Lighthouse performance score.
- URL: https://kedhar.vercel.app/case-study/data-notebook
- Tech: React, TypeScript, Recharts

## Previous Experience

- Research Intern at upGrad (January - April 2025): Hybrid malware detection system combining Yara rules with ML for cybersecurity
- AI Evaluator & Trainer at Outlier.AI (November 2024 - January 2025): Trained and evaluated generative AI models for mathematical reasoning
- Data Analyst Intern at Psyliq (January - February 2024): HR data analysis with Power BI, 25% improvement in data comprehension
- Senior Manager at AIESEC (2023): International exchange program management and team leadership
